title: Irish Golden Gratin
description: A comforting gluten-free gratin dish featuring a rich, golden sauce and a blend of Irish cheeses.
instructions: In a large saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the sliced potatoes and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
In a separate saucepan, combine the flour and milk, whisking until smooth.
Add the shredded cheddar and Gruyere cheese, stirring until melted.
Add the cooked potatoes to the cheese sauce and stir to combine.
Transfer the potato mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Dot the top with the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
Sprinkle with chopped thyme and season with salt and pepper.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the potatoes are tender.
